## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance is improving, with 126 clicks and 13,000+ impressions so far](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [177 articles published, 30 in consideration phase; team comfortable increasing content production](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Need to set up proper tracking of inbound leads and conversions via HubSpot integration](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Focusing on describing Knapsack functionality, especially private note-taking feature for compliance-sensitive industries](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [126 clicks on blogs, 13,000+ impressions](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Growing trend in both clicks and impressions, excluding one outlier spike](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [SEMrush estimates 482 website visitors from Nov 3-13](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [56 organic keywords ranking, some in top positions](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Top performing page: "AI predict crypto market trends" with 32 clicks, 2,500 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [177 articles published, 30 in consideration phase](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Team comfortable increasing content production rate](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Balancing Knapsack-specific content with broader AI/automation topics](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Focus on describing Knapsack functionality for medium/bottom funnel capture](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Targeting compliance officers and financial services professionals as initial ICP](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)

### Technical SEO Issue

  - [Discovered issue with how Knapsack appears in search results (URL/title mismatch)](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Jimmy to escalate to technical SEO team for resolution](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)

### Lead Tracking and Analytics

  - [Need to set up proper tracking of inbound leads and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Plan to integrate HubSpot with Webflow using Zapier](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Importance of attributing ROI to content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

### Private Note-Taking Feature

  - [Mark shared mockups of private note-taking automation](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [Compliant with FINRA "books and records" rule](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [On-device transcription and AI summary for data privacy](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [Ability to augment user's own notes with AI](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Discussion on outreach campaigns for backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Jimmy shared example of successful backlink growth through content (Firework case study)](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Tactical advice on setting up outreach email infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to set up Zapier integration for HubSpot lead tracking](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Sammy to create content on private meeting transcription feature](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
  - [Mark to provide access to Figma mockups for content team reference](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
  - [Continue balancing Knapsack-specific content with broader AI/automation topics](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Resolve technical SEO issue with search result appearance](https://fathom.video/share/x_Gc44EYS9X6CRkNW-PYxJraeFMmH_aJ?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
